temporal_description:
(00:00-00:03) A person in a dark, hooded robe lies curled up and motionless in a snow-filled doorway. They are framed by a frosted glass window, and their hands are pressed against the icy surface, fingers splayed as if in a final, desperate struggle. The scene is dark and ominous, with a faint light source from behind the figure. (Storyline: This opening shot establishes a mysterious and tragic event, suggesting a character has died or is in a state of extreme distress, trapped in a snowy location.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A high-pitched, eerie, and suspenseful musical score plays, creating a sense of horror and unease.)
(00:04-00:07) A man in a red plaid shirt and dark pants walks down a narrow, dimly lit hallway. The walls are covered in a dated, patterned wallpaper. He looks back over his shoulder with a wide, menacing grin, revealing a set of sharp, vampire-like fangs. (Storyline: This scene introduces a new character who is clearly a vampire, establishing him as a menacing and predatory figure.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The eerie, suspenseful music continues from the previous scene, linking the two events.)
